You are required to attend the enquiry at the stated date, time and venue.

Should you fail to attend without a valid reason, the enquiry may proceed in your absence and a decision may be made based on the information available.

You must notify the responsible employer representative as soon as reasonably possible if circumstances prevent your attendance.

The Employee, by their signature below, acknowledges receipt of this Notice to Attend and confirms that its contents and the applicable rights were explained in a form and language which they understand.

The Employee’s signature confirms receipt of the notice and does not constitute an admission regarding the matter described in it.

Should the Employee refuse to sign, the Witness confirms that the notice was delivered and explained to {{ doc.names or "the Employee" }}.
